category_sources: Official repository README says Fast Node Manager is a fast and simple Node.js version manager built in Rust.
source_facts.description says fnm is a fast and simple Node.js version manager.
display_name_sources: Official repository README uses the name Fast Node Manager (`fnm`).
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes installation, shell setup, configuration, and usage links.
Official repository contains a docs directory linked from the README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Schniz/fnm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository README and topics identify Node.js, JavaScript, and Rust implementation.
